Fast fashion
triples.object: Fast fashion is a business model in textile manufacturing of quickly creating and selling clothing and footwear at affordable prices by replicating the latest fashion trends and designs using cheap and fast mass production techniques. [ 1 ] [ 2 ] Multinational retailers that employ the fast fashion

triples.subject: Textile industry
Organic cotton
triples.object: Organic cotton is generally defined as cotton that is grown organically in subtropical countries, such as India , Turkey , China , and parts of the USA , from non- genetically modified plants, and without the use of any synthetic agricultural chemicals , such as fertilizers or pesticides [ 1 ] aside

triples.object: Fashion design is the art of applying design , aesthetics , clothing construction, and natural beauty to clothing and its accessories .
